hooks.command: if [ -d .lingtai/human/mailbox ]; then inbox=$(find .lingtai/human/mailbox/inbox -name message.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); outbox=$(find .lingtai/human/mailbox/outbox -name message.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$outbox" -gt 0 ]; then echo "LingTai network detected: $inbox in inbox, $outbox awaiting pickup."; else echo "LingTai network detected with $inbox message(s) in inbox."; fi; fi
